title: Inquisitor

notes:
Game starts but has red squares all over the menu. Probably because of missing Images. If you search in your Local Game File Directory of Inquisitor about a File named "gfx.ini" open it and change the Parameter "CreateLogFile" to 1, you get in the same directory a "log.txt" that is telling you so. For example: [... 6527485: LoadImageFromFileIntoTexture: create texture from file failed (2). The error code and filename:
6527485: local\menu\options_cinematics_play_unuse.tga
6527486: ERROR: Can't open file: graphics\ui\menu\options.gfx ...] . I think thats the problem. But i dont know how we gonna fix this on User-side...
